module_info.docstring: Stability detection via per-entry content hashing across snapshots.

classes.name: StabilityScore
classes.docstring: Stability assessment for a single entry.

classes.name: StabilityStore
classes.docstring: Persistent store for per-entry content hash history.

methods.name: save_snapshot
methods.docstring: Persist a new snapshot to the store.

functions.name: _iter_snapshot_hash_sections
functions.docstring:
Extract (hash, section) pairs from a snapshot.

Supports the Task 3 format (`entries`) and a compatibility fallback (`hashes`).

functions.name: record_snapshot
functions.docstring: Record a new snapshot of current entries.

functions.name: score_entries
functions.docstring:
Score each entry's stability based on snapshot history.

Rules:
- stable: hash appears in 3+ snapshots
- recent: hash appears in 0-2 snapshots, and for count==1 there is no prior different hash in the same section
- volatile: hash appears once, and a different hash existed previously in that same section
